description.para: Please refer to SDI Rx driver for details of the bitmasks.
The application should use the XV_SDIRXSS_IER* masks in the call back functions to decode the exact cause of interrupt and handle it accordingly.

briefdescription.para: Video lock interrupt mask.
Video unlock interrupt mask.
Overflow interrupt mask.
Underflow interrupt mask.
Vsync interrupt mask.
All interrupts mask.
Log event none.
Log event SDIRX Init.
Log event SDIRXSS Start.
Log event SDIRXSS Stop.
Log event SDIRXSS Reset.
Log event Stream Up.
Log event Stream Down.
Log event Over flow.
Log event Under flow.
Log event Stream Start.
Log event SDIRXSS Setstream.
Dummy Event should be last.
This typedef contains the enum for various logging events.
Handler for stream down event.
Handler for stream up event.
Handler for over flow event.
Handler for under flow event.
Handler for vsync event.
These constants specify different types of handler and used to differentiate interrupt requests from peripheral.
Prevent circular inclusions by using protection macros.
This macro reads the RX version.

parameterdescription.para: is a pointer to the XV_SdiRX core instance.

briefdescription.para: Callback type for interrupt.

parameterdescription.para: is a callback reference passed in by the upper layer when setting the callback functions, and passed back to the upper layer when the callback is invoked.

briefdescription.para: This function looks for the device configuration based on the unique device ID.

detaileddescription.para: The table XV_SdiRxSs_ConfigTable[] contains the configuration information for each instance of the device in the system.

parameterdescription.para: is the unique device ID of the device being looked up

simplesect.para: A pointer to the configuration table entry corresponding to the given device ID, or NULL if no match is found

briefdescription.para: This function returns the Index number of config table using BaseAddress.

parameterdescription.para: pointer to the instance structure
address of the instance

simplesect.para: Index number of the config table

briefdescription.para: This function initializes the video subsystem and included sub-cores.

detaileddescription.para: This function must be called prior to using the subsystem. Initialization includes setting up the instance data for top level as well as all included sub-core therein, and ensuring the hardware is in a known stable state.

parameterdescription.para: is a pointer to the Subsystem instance to be worked on.
points to the configuration structure associated with the subsystem instance.
is the base address of the device. If address translation is being used, then this parameter must reflect the virtual base address. Otherwise, the physical address should be used.

simplesect.para: XST_SUCCESS if initialization is successful else XST_FAILURE

briefdescription.para: This function calls the interrupt handler for SDI RX.

parameterdescription.para: is a pointer to the SDI RX Subsystem

briefdescription.para: This function enables the AXIS and video bridges.

parameterdescription.para: pointer to XV_SdiRxSs instance

briefdescription.para: This function disables the AXIS and video bridges.

parameterdescription.para: pointer to XV_SdiRxSs instance

briefdescription.para: This function starts the SDI RX stream detection.

parameterdescription.para: pointer to XV_SdiRxSs instance

specifies the mode of SDI modes searching operation.
0 = XV_SDIRX_SINGLESEARCHMODE_HD
1 = XV_SDIRX_SINGLESEARCHMODE_SD
2 = XV_SDIRX_SINGLESEARCHMODE_3G
4 = XV_SDIRX_SINGLESEARCHMODE_6G
5 = XV_SDIRX_SINGLESEARCHMODE_12GI
6 = XV_SDIRX_SINGLESEARCHMODE_12GF
10 = XV_SDIRX_MULTISEARCHMODE where the supported modes will be enabled by XV_SdiRx_EnableMode function

briefdescription.para: This function stops the SDI RX stream detection.

parameterdescription.para: is a pointer to the Subsystem instance to be worked on.

briefdescription.para: Reports detected errors in the SDI Rx Subsystem.

detaileddescription.para: This function examines the SDI Rx Subsystem instance and reports any detected errors that have occurred during SDI reception operations. The function can be used for debugging and error handling purposes.

parameterdescription.para: Pointer to the XV_SdiRxSs instance to be operated on.

simplesect.para: The caller must ensure that InstancePtr is a valid pointer to an initialized XV_SdiRxSs instance before calling this function.

briefdescription.para: This function enable the YUV444/RGB 10bit support SDI RX SS video stream.

parameterdescription.para: pointer to XV_SdiRxSs instance

briefdescription.para: This function disable the YUV444/RGB 10bit support SDI RX SS video stream.

parameterdescription.para: pointer to XV_SdiRxSs instance

briefdescription.para: This function installs an asynchronous callback function for the given HandlerType:

para.preformatted: HandlerType Callback Function Type ----------------------- --------------------------------------------- (XV_SDIRXSS_HANDLER_STREAM_DOWN) StreamDownCallback (XV_SDIRXSS_HANDLER_STREAM_UP) StreamUpCallback (XV_SDIRXSS_HANDLER_OVERFLOW) OverFlowCallback (XV_SDIRXSS_HANDLER_UNDERFLOW) UnderFlowCallback (XV_SDIRXSS_HANDLER_VSYNC) VsyncCallback

parameterdescription.para: is a pointer to the SDI RX Subsystem instance.
specifies the type of handler.
is the address of the callback function.
is a user data item that will be passed to the callback function when it is invoked.

listitem.para: XST_SUCCESS if callback function installed successfully.

simplesect.para: Invoking this function for a handler that already has been installed replaces it with the new handler.

briefdescription.para: This function reports list of cores included in Video Processing Subsystem.

parameterdescription.para: is a pointer to the Subsystem instance.

briefdescription.para: This function prints the SDI RX SS information.

parameterdescription.para: pointer to XV_SdiRxSs instance

briefdescription.para: This function prints the SDI RX SS debug information.

parameterdescription.para: pointer to XV_SdiRxSs instance

briefdescription.para: Retrieves the payload ID for a specified stream in the SDI Rx subsystem.

detaileddescription.para: This function returns the payload identifier associated with the given stream in the SDI Receiver subsystem instance.

parameterdescription.para: Pointer to the XV_SdiRxSs instance to be worked on.
The stream identifier for which the payload ID is to be retrieved.

simplesect.para: Pointer to u32 containing the payload ID for the specified stream. Returns NULL if the InstancePtr is invalid or StreamId is out of range.
The caller must ensure that InstancePtr is a valid and initialized XV_SdiRxSs instance before calling this function.

briefdescription.para: This function is used to wait for the payload valid bit to be set.

detaileddescription.para: This has to be called from application based on the callback indication of the video lock interrupt handler.

parameterdescription.para: pointer to XV_SdiRxSs instance

listitem.para: XST_FAILURE if the payload valid bits are not set.
XST_SUCCESS if ST352 registers are read and loaded to Rx structures

briefdescription.para: Gets the Transport information from the SDI Rx subsystem.

parameterdescription.para: Pointer to the XV_SdiRxSs instance.

simplesect.para: Pointer to the XSdiVid_Transport structure containing transport information.

briefdescription.para: This function returns the pointer to SDI RX SS video stream.

parameterdescription.para: pointer to XV_SdiRxSs instance
specifies which video stream's pointer to be returned

briefdescription.para: Gets the transport mode of the SDI receiver subsystem.

detaileddescription.para: This function retrieves the current transport mode configuration of the SDI (Serial Digital Interface) receiver subsystem instance.

parameterdescription.para: Pointer to the XV_SdiRxSs instance to query. Must not be NULL.

simplesect.para: XSdiVid_TransMode The current transport mode of the SDI receiver. Returns the transport mode enumeration value indicating the data transport configuration.
The InstancePtr must point to a valid and initialized XV_SdiRxSs instance.

briefdescription.para: Gets the transport bit rate information from the SDI Rx subsystem.

detaileddescription.para: This function retrieves the transport bit rate information of the SDI (Serial Digital Interface) receiver subsystem instance. It indicates whether the transport is operating in fractional mode or not.

parameterdescription.para: Pointer to the XV_SdiRxSs instance to query. Must not be NULL.

simplesect.para: u8 Returns 1 if the transport is operating in fractional mode, otherwise returns 0.
The InstancePtr must point to a valid and initialized XV_SdiRxSs instance.

briefdescription.para: This function checks if the video stream is up.

parameterdescription.para: pointer to XV_SdiRxSs instance

briefdescription.para: This function is used to configure the SDI RX interrupts that are to be handled by the application.

detaileddescription.para: Refer to xv_sdirxss_hw.h for interrupt masks.

parameterdescription.para: pointer to XV_SdiRxSs instance
Indicates Mask for enable interrupts.

briefdescription.para: This function is used to configure the SDI RX interrupts that are to be handled by the application.

detaileddescription.para: Refer to xv_sdirxss_hw.h for interrupt masks.

parameterdescription.para: pointer to XV_SdiRxSs instance
Indicates Mask for disabling interrupts.

briefdescription.para: This function performs self test on SDI Rx Subsystem sub-cores.

parameterdescription.para: is a pointer to the XV_SdiRxSs core instance.

briefdescription.para: This function will reset the driver's logging mechanism.

parameterdescription.para: is a pointer to the xv_sdirxss core instance.

briefdescription.para: This function will insert an event in the driver's logging mechanism.

parameterdescription.para: is a pointer to the XV_SdiRxSs core instance.
is the event type to log.
is the associated data for the event.

briefdescription.para: This function will read the last event from the log.

parameterdescription.para: is a pointer to the XV_SdiRxSs core instance.

briefdescription.para: This function will print the entire log.

parameterdescription.para: is a pointer to the XV_SdiRxSs core instance.

briefdescription.para: This function disables handling for no payload case.

parameterdescription.para: is a pointer to the XV_SdiRxSs core instance.
is to enable/disable the Handling of nopayload case

briefdescription.para: This is main header file of the Xilinx SDI RX Subsystem driver.

detaileddescription.para: Video Subsystem is a collection of IP cores bounded together by software to provide an abstract view of the processing pipe. It hides all the complexities of programming the underlying cores from end user.

Video Subsystem supports following features
AXI Stream Input/Output interface
2 pixel-wide video interface
10 bits per component
YCbCr 4:2:2 color space
Up to 4k2k 60Hz resolution (12G) at both Input and Output interface
Interlaced input support (1080i 50Hz/60Hz)

para.preformatted:
Ver Who Date Changes
1.00 jsr 07/17/17 Initial release.
